3218990.name: Lost in Fuzz
3218990.description:
We are stuck in a time loop slap-bang in the golden age of gaming. Step back into the 90s with this thrilling modern-retro 2D platformer, bursting with a vibrant vintage aesthetic. Grab your rad snapback, crack open a Sunny D, and dive headfirst into the world of Fuzz!

Key Features

  • Exciting and fast-paced 2D platforming adventure!

  • Explore 6 vibrant worlds, each with 3 unique acts packed with fun mechanics.

  • Take on 20+ challenges featuring medals and high score rewards.

  • Customize your nostalgia with CRT TV simulation options for the perfect retro vibe.

  • A soundtrack based on the Yamaha YM2612 (Found in Sega Genesis consoles)
